source_title: Thai Beef with Wasserspinat and Rice
normalized_title: Thai Beef with Water Spinach and Rice
query: Thai stir-fried beef with water spinach, garlic, chili, oyster sauce, and jasmine rice

draft.title: Thai Beef with Water Spinach and Rice
draft.description: Thai stir-fried beef with water spinach, garlic, chili, oyster sauce, and jasmine rice, perfect for a quick and flavorful home meal.

steps.text: Rinse jasmine rice under cold water until water runs clear. Cook rice with 500 ml water in a pot or rice cooker until tender, about 15 minutes.
Heat vegetable oil in a large wok or frying pan over medium-high heat. Add garlic and red chili, stir-fry for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add sliced beef and stir-fry until browned and nearly cooked through, about 3-4 minutes.
Add water spinach and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until wilted but still vibrant green.
Stir in oyster sauce and soy sauce, mix well to coat all ingredients evenly. Cook for another minute.
Serve the stir-fried beef and water spinach hot over the cooked jasmine rice.
